textByHash.00387ae5b9df3f77f5c18a91ce5a8f8c29cda2c0: Welcome. This room will test your observation skills.
textByHash.491a772002efce97049ea1b05c21eb70ffeaaebc: Please touch the statue you think has been added.
textByHash.6a567fee1ee211db88c701ebd48c617689d93b97: We will now dim the lights and bring the missing statue back in.
textByHash.75c8d5deb4588803df3ec74cf1f378e69fc6cedc: You have 10 seconds to memorise the statues... starting NOW!
textByHash.96f988fec58596714539839089800ee22378a949: Touch the statue that was brought in after you entered.
textByHash.a6913347b02b30ec4f4f39c58123991fbf943459: Excellent work. Please step through the portal to meet your next challenge.
textByHash.d251a4f4f6fdf502dfed7b3f1064a785f9c1a3b8: We will also mix the order up a little to make things interesting for you!
textByHash.f2fe43fdccc32b1b2ebd33169e29787bf0d0c514: No... I am very sorry. Apparently you are not up to the challenge. I will return you where you came from, better luck in the future.
textByHash.fcaaba989d221a6ebf60afa5e235f355eda67b42: If you touch the wrong one, you will fail this task, and will be escorted back to Falador.
textByHash.fdb5803e59f6462e633bfe3a5e4af9f353ff01b8: Study the statues closely. There is one missing statue in this room.
